issues.description: Condition missing: effect requires Leader to have {New Fish-Man Pirates} type, but condition is 'Always'. Should be {"type":"LeaderHasType","value":"New Fish-Man Pirates"}
Missing action: 'this Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle' is a keyword grant (GiveKeyword with 'Protection' or similar mechanic), not captured in DSL

Duration incorrect: 'until the start of your next turn' is not 'EndOfTurn'. Should be duration:"UntilStartOfNextTurn" or similar. Text says '[Your Turn]' context, but power boost persists into opponent's turn until next start
Action order: FlipLife should follow PowerBoost logically per card text ('Then, add 1 card...')
